chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1984 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.3121/2025. 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For hearing of CMA No.8500/2021. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.03.2025 Mr. Saadi Sardar, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ashraf Ali Butt, advocate for the respondent 2. Mr. Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed, advocate for the respondents. Mr. Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Petitioner has challenged some challan. No order has been assailed herein and no vires of any law is also under challenge. Learned counsel remains unable to assist as to how direct recourse to writ jurisdiction can be invoked merely to intervene in issuance of challan. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
